text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Long ago, there existed a competition called the
Unity Cup where teams competed in five race
categories—sprint, mile, medium, long, and dirt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it didn't affect an Umamusume's official
track record, the Unity Cup was still a
heart-pounding event where racers triumphed,
struggled, and worked together with companions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing Taiki Shuttle's impassioned appeal
for the return of the event, Director Akikawa
decides to reinstate the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Director Akikawa is suddenly
called abroad, so management of the Unity Cup
falls to the substitute director brought in to take
over her duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just what kind of person is Director Akikawa's
temporary replacement?
